course_title: PHYSICS OF THE ATMOSPHERE AND OCEAN I
description: Physical variables, laws, characteristics and direct measurements for atmosphere and ocean. Thermodynamics and moist atmospheric processes. Basic physics of clouds, precipitation, and chemical constituents.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: (PHYSICS 202,208, or248or concurrent enrollment inPHYSICS 202,208, or248) andMATH 234or concurrent enrollment inMATH 234
